title: Safer maintenance and live server health

notes.heading: Verified full maintenance
notes.body: Manual and scheduled maintenance now confirms a successful world save, creates and verifies a full backup, runs the normal no-validate update, and waits for the configured UDP port before reporting success.

notes.heading: Complete recovery data
notes.body: New backups include savegames, DedicatedServer.ini, the control profile, and recovery metadata. An optional secondary folder can receive a hash-verified copy, and retention runs only after verification.

notes.heading: Live players and crash protection
notes.body: The dashboard now shows players observed in server join and leave events. Unexpected app-managed server exits receive three backoff restart attempts before a visible crash-loop warning stops further retries.

notes.heading: Health that answers useful questions
notes.body: Health Check now shows the last successful save, newest backup age, backup-drive free space, recent fatal errors, installed Steam build, and log-confirmed readiness.

notes.heading: No setup changes required
notes.body: Your existing game port, passwords, schedule, and retention settings are preserved. Secondary backup storage is optional.
